name: git-master
tagline: Guides Claude through git commits, rebases, and history investigation with explicit mode gating and safety checks.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped skill. It explicitly forbids destructive git ops (force-push, protected-branch rebase, blind conflict resolution) without user consent, bans logging cookies/tokens/upload headers, and restricts PR-evidence uploads to GitHub's own attachment flow. Minor gaps: no version field for change tracking, and the STATUS mode named in the gate has no

highlights.summary: Mode Gate (lines 10-17) defines four modes including STATUS, but the body only has dedicated 'Commit Mode', 'Rebase Mode', and 'History Mode' sections (lines 43, 63, 76) — STATUS is left implicit, a m
No version field or changelog/last-updated marker in frontmatter or body, so a user can't tell if the skill's instructions changed since a prior install.
